label: May 21, 2026
headline: Hockey coach Baldev Singh to be honoured with Padma Shri
summary: Hockey coach Baldev Singh, who developed elite hockey talent in Shahabad Markanda, will be conferred the prestigious Padma Shri by President Droupadi Murmu on May 25. This honour recognizes his significant contributions to Indian hockey and sports development.
gd_angle: Recognition for contributions to sports, promoting national sporting excellence, and the importance of grassroots development in athletics.

label: May 21, 2026
headline: Myanmar military claims recapture of Thai border town
summary: Myanmar's military claimed to have recaptured a town on the Thai border, expanding the frontier trade crossings it controls amid a grinding civil war. This move is significant for regional stability and border dynamics.
gd_angle: Geopolitical stability in Southeast Asia, border security implications for neighbouring countries, regional conflicts and their impact on trade and security, and India's neighbourhood policy awareness.

label: May 21, 2026
headline: No double standards, we condemn Russia, U.S. and Israel for international law violations: Norway’s Foreign Minister
summary: Norway's Foreign Minister stated a policy of condemning international law violations by all nations, including Russia, the U.S., and Israel, without double standards. This position highlights a principled approach to international relations.
gd_angle: International relations, adherence to international law, human rights, global governance, and India's stance on neutrality and international norms.

label: May 21, 2026
headline: PM busy handing out candies in Italy amid economic storm at home, says Congress
summary: Prime Minister Narendra Modi was in Italy, while the Congress criticized his government over inflation, unemployment, and weakening economic indicators. The opposition accused the government of pursuing publicity amidst domestic economic challenges.
gd_angle: PM diplomacy and its role in enhancing India's global image, challenges of managing domestic economic issues while engaging in international relations, and political discourse surrounding governance and economic performance.

label: May 21, 2026
headline: Boosting climate action in Tamil Nadu
summary: Tamil Nadu has launched a State-owned Green Climate Fund with a ₹1,000 crore corpus to support clean energy, mobility, and water security. The state plans a dedicated climate budget of ₹3,000 crore, aiming for 100% renewable energy and expanded EV infrastructure by 2031.
gd_angle: Sustainable development, climate change mitigation strategies at the state level, importance of green financing, and India's commitment to achieving environmental goals.

label: May 21, 2026
headline: Iran examining U.S. proposal, as Trump says in ‘final stages’ of talks
summary: Iran is examining the latest U.S. proposal as former President Trump indicated being in the 'final stages' of talks. This suggests potential developments in the ongoing negotiations between the two nations.
gd_angle: International relations, nuclear diplomacy, stability in West Asia, and implications for India's energy security and geopolitical interests in the region.

label: May 21, 2026
headline: In ‘Naxal-free’ Bastar, Amit Shah lays out development blueprint for road ahead
summary: Union Home Minister Amit Shah visited Chhattisgarh's Bastar region, marking the symbolic conclusion of the 'Naxal Mukt Bharat' mission. He laid out a development blueprint, proclaiming India free from Naxalism after decades of conflict.
gd_angle: Internal security challenges, strategies for counter-insurgency and Naxalism, the role of security forces in maintaining peace, national development in conflict-affected areas, and governance reforms.

label: May 20, 2026
headline: Any step towards closing Tasmac shops is only welcome: HC
summary: The Madurai Bench of the Madras High Court on Wednesday while disposing of petitions filed by land owners and persons holding licence to sell snacks at Tasmac shops seeking a direction to forbear the authorities from closing the shops, said the court will not consider the doctrine of legitimate expectation as in ordinary commerce since the business itself is considered to be harmful to public health and public welfare. The court said Article 47 of the Constitution under the Directive Principles of State Policy states the State shall endeavour to bring about prohibition of the consumption except for medicinal purposes of intoxicating drinks and of drugs which are injurious to health.
gd_angle: Constitutional values, public welfare, state policy.

label: May 20, 2026
headline: AIKKMS urges Centre to withdraw VB-G RAM-G Act, continue earlier scheme
summary: Members of the All India Kisan Khet Mazdoor Sanghatan (AIKKMS) on Tuesday submitted a memorandum to the President and the Chief Minister through the Chief Executive Officer of the Kalaburagi Zilla Panchayat demanding withdrawal of the proposed Viksit Bharat Guarantee for Rozgar and Ajeevik Mission (Gramin) (VB-G RAM-G) Act 2025 and continuation of the erstwhile Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act (MGNREGA). In the memorandum, the organisation has urged the governments to enhance guaranteed employment under the NREGA from 100 human workdays to 200 human workdays a year and ensure a daily wage of ₹600 for workers.
gd_angle: Socio-economic policy, rural development, public welfare.

label: May 20, 2026
headline: NAPM demands moratorium on punitive enforcement during heat wave
summary: The National Alliance of People’s Movements strongly demanded an immediate moratorium on all eviction drives, livelihood confiscations and punitive enforcement actions against informal workers during peak summer months and heat wave periods.
gd_angle: Climate resilience, social equity, worker protection.

label: May 20, 2026
headline: New Income Tax Act, 2025 is more taxpayer-friendly, says Chief Commissioner of Income Tax
summary: Chief Commissioner of Income Tax, Madurai, V. Sreelekha, addressing an outreach programme on new Income Tax Act, 2025 in Madurai on Wednesday, stated the new Income Tax Act, 2025 is more taxpayer-friendly.
gd_angle: Fiscal policy, economic governance, financial literacy.

label: May 20, 2026
headline: The Hindu Maharashtra Infrastructure Conclave to be held in Mumbai on May 22
summary: The Hindu Group is organising the Maharashtra Infrastructure Conclave 2026, a high-impact platform bringing together policymakers, industry leaders, urban planners, infrastructure experts, investors, and developers to discuss the opportunities and challenges shaping Maharashtra’s next growth story.
gd_angle: Economic development, urban planning, investment climate.

label: May 20, 2026
headline: KTR praises Foxconn facility, says MoU inked during BRS regime yielding thousands of jobs
summary: While $500 million (around ₹4,100 crore) was initial investment committed, when the project broke ground in May 2023, it since has been raised to ₹5,000 crore. Foxconn had increased its target investment to $550 million (around ₹4,800 crore). Over ₹3,000 crore has been deployed on the facility, which includes the 1.4 million sq ft factory at Kongara Kalan, Telangana. The MoU inked during the BRS regime is yielding thousands of jobs.
gd_angle: Economic growth, foreign investment, strategic manufacturing.

label: May 20, 2026
headline: Karnataka Bank’s annual net profit up by 3%
summary: The board of directors approved the audited annual financial results for the quarter and full year which ended on March 31, 2026. Karnataka Bank's annual net profit was up by 3% compared to the previous fiscal year.

label: May 20, 2026
headline: Rules for new rural employment scheme to be issued soon
summary: Rules governing the new rural employment guarantee scheme, the Viksit Bharat – Guarantee for Rozgar and Ajeevika Mission (Gramin), which is scheduled to come into force from July 1, will be released by the government in the next few days, officials of the Union Ministry of Rural Development informed a Parliamentary Standing Committee on Wednesday.
gd_angle: Rural development, social security, policy implementation.

label: May 20, 2026
headline: Global and National Updates: Ebola, PM Diplomacy, Geopolitics, and Constitutional Matters
summary: The WHO has issued its highest-level alert over the Ebola outbreak in Central Africa. PM Modi held meetings with Giorgia Meloni. Vladimir Putin's high-stakes Beijing visit and the Supreme Court’s remarks backing caste enumeration in Census 2027 were also highlighted.
gd_angle: Global health security, international relations, constitutional discourse.

label: May 20, 2026
headline: Telangana gets ₹1,420 cr. central aid for projects in Warangal, Karimnagar and Khammam
summary: The Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs’ (MoHUA) first National Apex Committee (NAC) for the Urban Challenge Fund (UCF) has, in principle, approved three projects across 26 urban local bodies in Telangana with a total outlay of ₹5,681.6 crore, with central aid amounting to ₹1,420 crore. Projects include a ₹5,681.6 crore underground sewerage network in Warangal and a ₹840 crore project in Karimnagar covering solid waste management, riverfront development, stormwater drains, roads, and a skywalk.
gd_angle: Urban development, infrastructure funding, sustainable cities.
